rows.caveat: Real-adapter ladder passed reductions, 4D diagnostics, the N-chain trajectory/tape gate, and the N-chain STM/QR oracle gate.
rows.nextAction: Keep this vendor runner on the scheduled WebGPU evidence cadence and refresh after driver/browser updates.

collectionContract.rule: Only reports produced on a real adapter and passing same-run CPU f64 oracle gates count as vendor evidence.

caveat: The matrix is intentionally incomplete until missing physical vendor runners upload evidence. Software adapters do not satisfy this contract.
